steps.description: Click on the "Type a message" text box in the Microsoft Teams application to activate the input field for message entry.

parameters.text: How to develop agent for Teams?

steps.description: Type the text "How to develop agent for Teams?" into the message input field at the bottom of the Teams interface within the "vscuse_app_kNEUMlocal" application tab.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the message input "How to develop agent for Teams?" in the chat interface of the "vscuse_app_kNEUMlocal" tab within Microsoft Teams.
